full_description: FocusFlow is a productivity app designed to help users stay focused and avoid distractions. It uses techniques like the Pomodoro timer, which works in 25-minute increments, followed by a 5-minute break, to help you stay on track. Additionally, it includes a website blocking feature to minimize digital distractions. The app promotes a healthy work-life balance by encouraging regular breaks and helping you prioritize tasks. With FocusFlow, you can customize your work sessions, track your progress, and set goals to achieve. Download FocusFlow today and take control of your productivity.
